title: Micro-Frontends/Services Ownership
description: Manage ownership for micro-frontends and microservices by designing a clear RACI (Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed) matrix. Ensure continuous ownership and maintenance of shared components and legacy systems within a distributed architecture.
objectives: Manage ownership for micro-frontends and microservices by designing a clear RACI (Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed) matrix.
Ensure continuous ownership and maintenance of shared components and legacy systems within a distributed architecture.
